description_raw_html:
Company Description
-------------------

At American Well, we believe digital care delivery will transform healthcare. Our mission is to connect and enable providers, insurers, patients, and innovators to deliver greater access to more affordable, higher quality care. We do this by partnering with our clients to deliver video visits over mobile and web. We have doctors, therapists, and specialists on staff to help people get care when and where they need it most.

Brief Overview:
The Project Manager will play a critical role in interfacing with clients, as well as internal sales, technology, product, and marketing organizations. Specifically, the Project Manager will be responsible for driving a successful implementation of the American Well telehealth platform, which meets specified objectives and requirements set by the client, and positioning the client for success with its telehealth service.

Core Responsibilities:
  • Serves as an expert in all aspects of the American Well platform
  • During the initial client implementation, serves as the primary client contact and managing all aspects of the implementation project. Coordinates with internal technical, QA, marketing, and visual design teams to ensure delivery according to the agreed upon scope and schedule
  • Manages client expectations by building relationships, communicating project status and open issues, preparing reports, managing change, and facilitating weekly meetings
  • Provides functional and technical guidance to the client's project team relative to workflow and solutions design
  • Manages the overall requirements process to ensure the platform is configured to meet the client's needs
  • Facilitates training sessions for the client's project and operational teams, and end users of the platform, specific to each client's business model
  • Communicates project status with team members and and senior business stakeholders
  • Utilizes sound judgment in assessing project health; identifying, mitigating and resolving project issues and risks to ensure on-time project delivery
  • Provides ongoing support and management of new business initiatives, software upgrades, and enhancements
  • Partners with the Account Director to support client account growth and drive ongoing project activities in support of the client's strategic objectives
  • Contributes to continuous process improvements within the Professional Services organization
Qualifications:
  • 4-6 years of project management and/or consulting experience
  • Ability to concurrently manage multiple large projects in a technical and cross-functional environment, leading clients and team members through complex system implementations with aggressive delivery deadlines
  • Exceptional communication, leadership, team building, and people management skills
  • Outstanding time management and organization skills
  • Proven history of managing project teams to meet aggressive deadlines, utilizing sound project management methodology (processes, best practices, tools, and templates)
  • Ability to utilize effective communication skills to mitigate project risk
  • Proven experience managing project scope and schedule
  • Fluency with Microsoft Office Project, Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Visio
  • Project Management Professional (PMP®) certification highly desired
  • Flexibility to travel up to 30% (overnight)
Additional information
----------------------

Your Team:
Should you join American Well and the Professional Services team, you can expect:

Work hard play hard is definitely the mentality of the Professional Services team. We are the movers and the shakers in the American Well pyramid. Tasked with advancing client goals, workflows, and overall experience, thinking "outside of the box" is the only consistency each day on the Professional Services Team!

Comprised of five key areas of focus - Health Systems, Health Plans, Employers, Strategic Accounts, and a Project Management Office - this poised, articulate and fast-paced team is the driving force between our clients and American Well's revolutionary technology. Each specialized area within the Professional Services team has a common goal of managing an effortless and efficient user experience from behind the scenes; this team bridges the gap between the wants and needs of each unique client, putting them into action.

Telehealth is a new, exciting and evolving technology, changing the healthcare world. If you are passionate about healthcare, and would like to be surrounded by energetic, innovative team members…. We can't wait to meet you!

Working at American Well:
American Well is changing how care is delivered through online and mobile technology. We strive to make the hard work of healthcare look easy. In order to make this a reality, we look for people with a fast-paced, mission-driven mentality. We're a go-getter culture that prides itself on quality, efficiency, smarts, initiative, creative thinking, and a strong work ethic. Our corporate headquarters are located in downtown Boston at 75 State Street –in the heart of the city. In addition to the opportunity to build the future of healthcare technology and a great location, we offer:

  • Unlimited Personal Time Off (Vacation time)
  • 401K match
  • Competitive healthcare, dental and vision insurance plans
  • Free gym access – on-site
  • Prime office space with views overlooking all of Boston
  • Complimentary snacks and drinks

description_raw_html:
Senior Project Manager- Razorfish Health, Philadelphia(Job Number: RHW000892)

Description
About Razorfish Health
Razorfish Health is unique among the roster of the largest healthcare agencies. Here’s why:
At Razorfish Health, we were built on re-invention. We were one of the very first digital agencies more than two decades ago, and we have continued to reinvent our agency, our team, and we specialize in re-inventing brands, campaigns and categories every day.
We have the deepest team of credentialed medical scientists, an award winning creative team, and an in-house data analytics team which allows us to understand the insights driving physicians, payers, and patients and to create ideas that help transform our clients’ brands.
We have offices in New York, Chicago, Philadelphia, and London with over 300 colleagues, serving a broad base of clients including 4 of the top 10 pharma companies, as well as OTC, biotech and health systems and hospitals.
In a sea of same, we swim differently. Our people are unique. Our perspectives are unique. Find out why our employees are proud to say #IAmARazorfish.
Web: http://www.razorfishhealth.com | Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/razorfishhealth
Twitter: https://twitter.com/RazorfishHealth
Overall Description
Razorfish Health is seeking a Senior Project Manager to join a robust team who are leading our clients to new innovations. The ideal candidate is a project management expert, mentor, and advocate. They are a trusted partner able to align internal teams with a mutual understanding of all deliverables and drive them to execution. The Senior Project Manager will understand agency work products to oversee a team delivering work for at least one significant client book of business. They will partner with other departments to resolve project-level issues and advocate for process improvements. The Senior Project Manager’s responsibilities include, but are not limited to, the following:
  • Act as the project lead across projects and be ultimately responsible for the delivery of high-quality deliverables that power client satisfaction, meet business requirements, and balance client and agency economics
  • Define project scope, draft statements of work (SOWs), create staff plans, estimate budgets, and produce timelines that align to client and business needs
  • Interface heavily with marketing, technical, and creative senior leads to assure that the solution is understood and addresses the customer's business requirements
  • Manage the execution of work, which includes tracking team progress, routing deliverables for approval, monitoring scope, and analyzing financial performance
  • Actively monitor project risks/issues, escalate in a timely manner, and drive teams to effective solutions
  • Be responsible for the accurate financial management of the portfolio of projects to which they are assigned
  • In addition to the project responsibilities, may support pre-sales planning and scoping activities
  • Managing and mentoring junior staff
Qualifications
  • 5-7+ years applicable experience as a Project Manager in an agency setting
  • Fully integrated (marketing, technical, digital, etc) delivery experience is required
  • Healthcare or pharma experience is required
  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, MIS, Business Administration, or related field is preferred but not required
  • Solid understanding of project management methodology, including the ability to identify and resolve issues, manage risk, and develop detailed work plans and specifications
  • Comfort managing multidisciplinary teams, which may consist of creatives, technologists, media experts, etc
  • Experience interfacing with clients and partner vendors on technical delivery projects

About Publicis Health
Publicis Health is the world’s premier health-oriented agency network. A division of Publicis Groupe, Publicis Health manages top-tier agencies specializing in promoting innovative solutions in advertising, digital, branding, message delivery, market access, and medical communications. Publicis Health’s mission is to be the indispensable force for health and wellness business transformation through the alchemy of creativity and technology—for good.
With more than 5,000 employees around the world, Publicis Health manages 18 agency brands through 40 offices located in seven countries. Publicis Health brands include Digitas Health, Discovery USA, Heartbeat, in-sync, Langland, Maxcess Managed Markets, Payer Sciences, PDI, PlowShare Group, Publicis Health Media, Publicis LifeBrands, Publicis Resolute, Publicis Touchpoint Solutions, Razorfish Health, Real Science, Saatchi & Saatchi Wellness, Tardis Medical Consultancy, and Verilogue.

Web: www.publicishealth.com | Facebook: www.facebook.com/publicishealth
Twitter: www.twitter.com/PublicisHealth/

Not all applicants will be contacted. Publicis Health is an equal opportunity employer. No vendor/agency solicitation please.

description_raw_html:
Who We Are
At Cross River, we’re building the best banking and technology products for fintechs, all through APIs. As venture-backed pioneers of the platform-based financial services model known as the sponsor, or partner, bank, we work closely with our partners to offer products such as payments rails and loan origination services to the latest in regulatory and compliance solutions. What drives us every day? A desire to innovate in the service of financial inclusion. Giving access to consumers, whether they are looking for credit or for a better way to pay has been in our DNA from day one. Our nimble, adaptive, one-step ahead culture is powered by our people, and as a result of their creativity, tech-forward thinking and collaborative spirit, we are experiencing explosive growth.



What we’re looking for

Cross River’s Technology team is made up of problem solvers hungry to perfect new products and systems. As IT Project Manager you play a key role.

At Cross River, our technology team has an open and transparent environment around process, architecture and development, and everyone’s work is impactful. From building APIs, designing new applications, managing our data platform, deploying new systems or supporting it all, we work together in a cohesive and nimble team that gets things done.

In this role you will focus on coordination for projects to ensure that they are successful. This will require gathering information across departments, consultant oversight, tool administration, testing and roll outs. One of the projects will include duplicating our current case management system within Salesforce and setting up basic CRM tools across the company. The IT Project Manager will work hand in hand with the Salesforce admin and internal developers for internal projects


Responsibilities:
  • Ensure that all projects are delivered on-time, within scope and within budget
  • Developing project scopes and objectives, involving all relevant stakeholders and ensuring technical feasibility
  • Ensure resource availability and allocation
  • Develop a detailed project plan to track progress
  • Use appropriate verification techniques to manage changes in project scope, schedule and costs
  • Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools and techniques
  • Report and escalate to management as needed
  • Manage the relationship with the client and all stakeholders
  • Perform risk management to minimize project risks
  • Establish and maintain relationships with third parties/vendors
  • Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation


Qualifications:
  • Great educational background, preferably in the fields of computer science or engineering for technical project managers
  • Proven working experience as a project administrator in the information technology sector
  • Solid technical background, with understanding or hands-on experience in software development and web technologies
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills
  • Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office
  • PMP / PRINCE II certification is a plus
  • Experience with Sales Force

description_raw_html:
C2 Systems is currently seeking a Technical Project Manager in support of our software development programs.


Job summary


In this role, you will be an integral part of the Software team! You will be responsible for creating and maintaining project plans and reporting project status back to Senior Management. You will work with the Development, QA, and Support teams to help coordinate their deliverables and provide unified schedules across the different functional groups. As a Technical Project Manager, you will need to have familiarity with the software development process to facilitate collaboration across teams. You will be expected to be self-motivated and accountable for your own commitments and deliverables. This position is based in our Auburn, NH office and is a great opportunity to make a difference in a rapidly growing company!

Primary Job Responsibilities

Position Overview

  • C Squared PMs are responsible for their projects from their inception through to final delivery and beyond
  • We expect our PMs to deliver projects on time, ensuring deadlines are met while helping to develop, grow and support their team along the way
  • You must love a challenge and be a good problem solver
  • Act as a Liaison between teams, including upper management, Development, QA, Architecture & Design, Support, End Customers and the Sales Team.

Core Responsibilities

  • Initiate and plan the approach of each project with the cross functional teams to formulate a detailed scope definition
  • Drive detailed estimates, work breakdown, and planning to create accurate project plans and detailed project tracking
  • Identify, quantify, and manage risk as you monitor and control the project scope and schedule throughout the project lifecycle
  • Monitor project milestones and oversee and lead day-to-day project operations
  • Create detailed project documentation and facilitate client working sessions and project status meetings
  • Be a team player and advocate for your team to build relationships within the organization
  • Foster a long lasting, “trusted advisor” relationship with internal and external stakeholders
  • Be flexible and adapt to the needs of your stakeholders in a fast-paced, ever changing environment
  • Report on project performance status and baseline comparisons as requested

Requirements

Knowledge and experience with Project Management methodologies

Familiarity with the software development life cycle (Waterfall or Agile)

Strong attention to detail

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

Understand the Expectation of “Owning a Project End to End”

Background in Microsoft Office Products (Office, Word, Excel, Powerpoint, MS Project)

Ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously.

Ability to shift priorities at the drop of hat

Comfort in working with external stakeholders in multiple companies simultaneously.

Preferred

Project Management certification (PMP, CSM, etc.)

Technical Background

Understanding of any of the following: basic computer networking, database management, and/or software development, DAS or WLAN

description_raw_html:
Company Overview:
-----------------

ARCHIBUS-Serraview, global provider of an integrated workplace management system (IWMS) platform, and a cloud-based provider of space optimization and workforce enablement software, recently announced that they have merged to create a leading provider of solutions for managing the modern built environment. This powerful business combination unites the ARCHIBUS-Serraview comprehensive suite of real estate, infrastructure, and facilities management solutions with cloud-first, employee-centric space management software to help organizations optimize the "Workplace of the Future." The combined company will offer thousands of customers around the world an integrated IoT powered, user-friendly platform to effectively manage their real estate facilities, infrastructure, and workplace assets, and enable employees.

Position Summary:
-----------------

The Implementation Project Manager is responsible for onboarding customers so they may successful use and quickly realize value with our products. He or she is expected to properly manage implementation projects according to the schedule, budget and with the expected capabilities fully in use at launch. This is accomplished by working closely with Customer Success Managers, Trainers, Engineers and Sales to properly understand the customer priorities, align company resources and efforts, and ensure an outcome of highly productive, satisfied customers. The ideal candidate has extensive, successful experience managing SaaS implementation project teams comprised of diverse skills across multiple locations.

Essential Functions / Primary Duties:
-------------------------------------

To perform this job successfully an individual must be able to perform each essential function satisfactorily. Essential functions and primary duties may vary, but include:

  • Manage SaaS-based implementation and upgrade projects while ensuring time, budget and scope expectations are met.
  • Gather customer data in a timely manner, work with the customer to prepare and validate data, and load data into the new product.
  • Gather business and functional requirements from the customer and configure the product(s) according the specifications.
  • Work with engineers to translate business needs into documented technical requirements
  • Ensure best practices are implemented, understood by the customers and in use at launch
  • Facilitate user acceptance testing with customers and receive customer sign-off
  • Use project plans, customer management skills and tools to ensure timely and accurate customer decisions and actions during the implementation process
  • Work closely in partnership with the customer and internal team members to ensure all parties are clear in expectations, responsibilities and outcomes
  • Manage risks and issues to prevent project delays or overruns, while escalating when appropriate.
  • Work with leadership to manage priority of work across projects
  • Look for opportunities to improve process, templates and tools to scale project management and implementation processes
Qualifications / Knowledge of:
-----------------------------------

  • Project management best practices, methodologies and deliverables
  • SaaS implementation, configuration, integration and migration techniques
  • Data gathering, validation and preparation techniques
  • Organization and time management skills for managing multiple projects and assignments
  • Business and productivity tools such as presentation, document, spreadsheet, project and task management software
ABILITY TO:
  • Take ownership of assigned responsibilities and independently execute while using good-judgement when to seek help to ensure successful outcomes
  • Accurately communicate team and individual capacity, and understand priorities
  • Exhibit superior customer focus and professionalism even in stressful situations
  • Provide leadership and influence others to achieve exceptional results and meet /exceed customer expectations
  • Effectively and diplomatically communicate both orally and in writing
  • Adapt to changes in priority and effectively align efforts for successful execution
Experience/Training: Experience:
-------------------------------

  • 3-5 years of project management experience with SaaS implementations.
  • Experience in workplace management is a plus.
  • Must have demonstrated experience in successfully leading cross-functional teams on software projects that are on-time, within budget and according to customer and contractual expectations.
Education / Training:
---------------------

  • Bachelor's degree. A technical or business discipline is preferred
An Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.

Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled

Work with leadership to manage priority of work across projects Look for opportunities to improve process, templates and tools to scale project management and implementation processes Qualifications / Knowledge of: ----------------------------------- Project management best practices, methodologies and deliverables SaaS implementation, configuration, integration and migration techniques Data gathering, validation and preparation techniques Organization and time management skills for managing multiple projects and assignments Business and productivity tools such as presentation, document, spreadsheet, project and task management software ABILITY TO: Take ownership of assigned responsibilities and independently execute while using good-judgement when to seek help to ensure successful outcomes Accurately communicate team and individual capacity, and understand priorities Exhibit superior customer focus and professionalism even in stressful situations Provide leadership and influence others to achieve exceptional results and meet /exceed customer expectations Effectively and diplomatically communicate both orally and in writing Adapt to changes in priority and effectively align efforts for successful execution Experience/Training: Experience: ------------------------------- 3-5 years of project management experience with SaaS implementations. Experience in workplace management is a plus. Must have demonstrated experience in successfully leading cross-functional teams on software projects that are on-time, within budget and according to customer and contractual expectations. Education / Training: --------------------- Bachelor's degree. A technical or business discipline is preferred An Equal Opportunity Employer. description_raw_html:
Position Overview:
The Associate Project Manager is responsible for managing basic projects and may help other project managers with administrative duties required to support Entrust Datacard’s Professional Services strategic projects in their effective delivery.

Responsibilities:
  • Assist with multiple projects across Entrust Datacard; gather all project information: data requests, assignments, tasks, and project meetings for consolidation and reporting.
  • Maintains the schedule of jobs being handled, maintains accurate database on current projects, and assists in assuring required specifications are met for all jobs in progress. Maintain a high level of teamwork and communication in ensuring a balanced workload within the team.
  • Coordinate meetings internally and externally as needed to mitigate issues and risks and provide status updates
  • Maintain schedules and calendars, participate in Professional Services team meetings, and ensure coordination between all disciplines of Professional Services.
  • Act as the link between Professional Services, Sales, and customers related to project tasks and status.
  • Consistently provides responsive, quality service to customers. Actively participates in coordinating, analyzing, and acting upon information and feedback of customer needs, pricing, products, competition, and procedures.
  • Prepare and/or edit meeting minutes, presentations, and tables.
  • Ensure adherence to deadlines for critical deliverables.
  • Assist with the development and publishing of communications as needed.

Basic Qualifications
  • Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent experience
  • Minimum 2+ years’ experience with project coordination
  • Strong MS Office software experience
  • Travel requirement: up to 10%
  • Must be able to lawfully work within the US and have unrestricted work authorization for US
  • Ability to work independently and self-start but also take instruction from colleagues in assisting with project tasks
Preferred Qualifications:

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • Excellent organizational skills
  • Ability to work well with others
Our growing company relies on curious, dedicated and innovative colleagues to anticipate the future and provide solutions for a more connected, mobile and secure world. Entrust Datacard technologies and expertise help government agencies, enterprises and financial institutions in more than 150 countries serve and safeguard citizens, employees and consumers. Each year, our solutions secure billions of transactions — and every day, our technologies issue and manage more than 10 million secure identities. How do we do all of this? Together.
Join us. Together we’ll create solutions for a more connected, mobile and secure life.
For more information, visit www.entrustdatacard.com. Follow us on Twitter, YouTube and LinkedIn.
Entrust Datacard Corporation is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, sex, color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, or on the basis of disability.

NO AGENCIES, NO RELOCATION
#LI-CG

description_raw_html:
Please Note: US citizenship or permanent residency is required for this position.

CesiumAstro is a rapidly growing space technology startup in Austin, Texas, developing out-of-the-box communication systems for satellites, UAVs, launch vehicles, and other space and airborne platforms. Our approach is unique, and our team is changing the world of space communications. Learn more about our company at http://www.cesiumastro.com.

We are looking to add a Business Analyst to our team. The ideal candidate thrives on using data to automate business processes and illuminate financial opportunities. If you are great at what you do, enjoy working in a startup environment, and are passionate about business transformation, we would like to hear from you.

In this position, you will establish processes that enable rapid growth while limiting support expenditures. This will include evaluation of corporate software tools, optimization of a new ERP system, and data connections between ongoing systems. You will be highly involved in financial processes such as forecast variance analysis, competitor benchmarking, and establishment and monitoring of corporate performance indicators.

CesiumAstro is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, protected veteran status, or disability status.

We provide a generous benefits and stock option package to all our employees.

Key responsibilities:

  • Help architect and develop a warehouse for key corporate data
  • Evaluate reporting tools and recommend a cost-effective dashboard solution
  • Develop KPI reporting for use by executive management and key business functions (Business Development, Sales/Support, Finance/Accounting, HR, etc.)
  • Maximize ERP leverage through development and testing of both proprietary and bolt-on enhancements
  • Develop custom ERP reports as required by the business functions
  • Interpret financial data and recommend primary areas for meaningful improvement
  • Assist with wide array of additional functions as necessary within rapid growth startup

Successful candidates will have:

  • Bachelor's degree
  • Database and SQL experience; strong Excel skills
  • 2+ years of experience working in a Finance or Business Analysis function
  • Experience interfacing with ERP (Microsoft Dynamics, NetSuite, SAP, Oracle, etc.) and other corporate systems
  • Knowledge of BI and reporting systems
  • Strong understanding of data and ETL architectures
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Time management skills, with ability to separate the important tasks from the noise
  • Sense of urgency, with ability to work well under pressure

Preferred experience includes:

  • Experience creating financial models for ROI analysis and business forecasting
  • Experience wearing multiple hats at a rapidly growing startup company

description_raw_html:
Ellwood Specialty Steel Group is the leading distributor and a fully-integrated producer of tool steels for plastic molds, die cast and forging dies and other tooling applications. Our steel and aluminum are used to make countless parts for automobiles, aircraft, and consumer products.

As part of our evolving needs and in response to rapid growth, we currently have an opening for a talented Senior Business Analyst.

If you’re an ambitious self-starter who is passionate about technology, information systems and manufacturing, we want to hear from you!

The Senior Business Analyst will lead and manage all software and information systems projects for ESSG’s five companies in North America. S/He will work closely with business leaders to help the organization achieve its goals, grow market share and perform at a higher level.

This exempt position is located at the Ellwood Specialty Steel Group headquarters in New Castle, PA and will report to the President of ESSG.

Responsibilities:

  • Lead the implementation, upgrades, management and maintenance of all ERP, inventory and other software systems used by ESSG.
  • Partner with ESSG leaders to develop and onboard tools and systems to differentiate our companies, better serve customers, and grow sales.
  • Lead the implementation of Salesforce.com with sales leaders and other IT professionals.
  • Help manage and grow our online presence, including but not limited to websites, advertising, and ecommerce.
  • Partner with technical personnel and other managers to develop a quality system for the organization.
  • Advance ESSG’s ability to collect, aggregate and analyze data for more effective and efficient decision-making.
  • Collaborate with key personnel to monitor and reduce company costs.
  • Train ESSG personnel to use business software systems as needed.
  • Coordinate all business system development, implementation and maintenance with the corporate IT Group.
  • Perform other duties as required.

Qualifications:

  • B.S. in Information Systems required.
  • ERP experience in a manufacturing setting required.
  • Minimum of 5 years as a business systems analyst or similar.
  • Experience supporting multiple companies and/or sizeable organizations preferred.
  • Experience and/or education in web-enabled business platforms preferred.
  • Syteline, SAP, HTML and Salesforce.com familiarity a plus.
  • Strong interpersonal skills and ability to work with diverse backgrounds of people.
  • Self-motivated and self-disciplined. Strong drive for and demonstrated experience with continuous improvement.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills.
  • Excellent problem solving and listening skills are essential.
  • Requires periodic routine travel, including international. Travel may increase substantially during implementations and other projects.

ELLWOOD Specialty Steel Group is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. Minorities/Females/Individuals With Disabilities/Protected Veterans.

IND-123

Education

Preferred
  • Bachelors or better in Information Technology

description_raw_html:
Major Responsibilities

  • SAP
    • Update and maintain system security to ensure there are no improper delegations of authority.
    • Keeping track of all SAP program customizations and customized reports and developing a process to control and maintain them.
    • Develop simple queries and direct and coordinate the development of more complex queries with our external applications development partner Soft Engine.
      • Examples of simple queries would be edit reports, and check balance reports
    • Maintain training guides and procedures.
    • Coordinate troubleshooting with our external applications development partner (Soft Engine).
  • IT Operations
    • Network
      • Ensure our external hardware support partner (TMS) is performing as expected. Develop and monitor performance against KPI’s.,
        • This will involve regular monitoring of their activities on a monthly basis.
      • Troubleshoot hardware issues and coordinate responses with our external hardware support partner or address easily remedied problems directly.
    • Projects
      • Prepare documentation for projects (e.g. documentation for testing)
      • Possibly provide set up for testing
    • Website support for ecommerce
      • Secure Domain names
      • Secure Mailboxes
      • Coordinate with 3rd party solutions
    • Training
      • Develop and conduct training for various applications with the related user base.
    • Organizational improvement
      • Work with Director of IT to identify and evaluate researched and recommended IT solutions


Please note this job description is not designed to cover or contain a comprehensive listing of activities, duties or responsibilities that are required of the employee for this job. Duties, responsibilities and activities may change at any time with or without notice.


Specific Measures of Job Performance

  • Ensuring adequate segregation of duties is maintained in the SAP environment
  • Develop accurate records of all customizations and ensuring the impact of any systems changes and or upgrades results in the timely release of these customizations in the new environment.
  • Ensuring that all documentation developed is accurate and updated regularly.
  • Ensuring the userbase is satisfied with their support from TMS
  • Ensure all items requested to support websites and ecommerce are delivered timely and accurately.
  • Ensure that users are properly and regularly trained in the applications they use.
  • Bring solutions to the table which meaningfully improve quality and efficiency of the organization.


Qualifications

  • Consumer products industry experience across multiple companies
  • Understanding of controls and the need for segregation of duties in an ERP system.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Demonstrated success in multi-tasking on several major initiatives concurrently
  • Strong written and documentation skills, including writing software user guidelines
  • Willing to work on a variety of business platforms and solutions
  • Experience working in $100M to $300M+ sized entrepreneurial company
  • Exceptional strong work ethic with ability to do what it takes to get the job done
  • Outstanding communication abilities


Skill Sets

  • Prior experience working in a consumer goods distribution organization
  • Broad knowledge of business processes including sales and distribution, supply chain management, procurement, general ledger, inventory management, and accounts payables/accounts receivables.
  • Experience in implementing and supporting a supply chain management system
  • Strong familiarity with B2B and B2C and e-commerce systems such as AWS, Shopify, Magento, Channel Advisor
  • Five (5) years’ experience with SQL programming, preferably with MS SQL Server
  • Five (5) years’ solid ERP experience, preferably with SAP Business One
  • Three (3) years of Crystal Reports and/or Business Intelligence experience
  • Experience with collaboration, productivity, and workflow-based solutions
  • Exposure to X12 EDI and various service provider portals such as SPS Commerce, True Commerce
  • Broad knowledge of supporting Windows 10 and Mac OS workstations and laptops and having a sufficient background to troubleshoot common issues
  • Broad knowledge of connecting and setting up various PC workstations, audio video devices


Technical/Industry Requirements

  • Requires strong applications experience with ERP systems
  • Successful implementation of e-commerce systems
  • Successful in creating interface solutions into ERP, e-commerce, and other business systems
  • Experience working with and implementing decision support systems
  • Experience working in a model utilizing outside resources and working in a cloud environment


Education Requirements

  • BS/BA in computer science, engineering, or relevant field or equivalent
  • CompTIA A+ PC Technician certification or equivalent


Work Environment
This job operates in a professional office environment. This role routinely uses standard office equipment such as computers, phones, photocopiers, filing cabinets and fax machines.

description_raw_html:
Senior Business Analyst sought by Sunquest Information Systems, Inc. in Tucson, AZ. 40 hrs/wk.

Duties: Create and continuously improve complex reports and analysis of key performance metrics; Obtain necessary data required to complete analysis in support of key strategic initiatives; Identify, research, and report on the causes for fluctuations outside of anticipated parameters; Works with leadership to explain key discoveries, builds action plans, and drives them to completion; Identify key measurements that will impact the overall company performance and implement methods to drive into operations; Develop, deploy and maintain forecasting methodologies to ensure accurate projections for Solution Adoption teams; Mentor and guide other business analysts; Lead initiatives centered on the continuous improvement of key business systems; Lead initiatives centered on the improvement of key business practices and processes; All other duties and responsibilities as assigned including significant ad hoc analysis.

Min. Requirements: Bachelor's degree or higher in management information systems, accounting, finance, economics, science, or mathematics and 5 years of experience in business analysis or equivalent which included reporting, data mining, reading and interpreting financial statements and identifying trend analysis.

Skills: 5 years of experience in healthcare software industry; 5 years of predictive analytics which include creation of 12 to 60 month forward looking sales models; 5 years of advanced proficiency using SQL and advanced excel capabilities; 5 years of sales compensation modeling and variable compensation plan administration additional experience using salesforce, adaptive Insights, Softrax, or Netsuite Openair; 5 years advanced proficiency with Microsoft office (Word, Powerpoint, Outlook); 5 years proficiency with project management techniques required; 5 years of database administration and information system configuration experience required.

Equal Opportunity Employer/Protected Veterans/Individuals with Disabilities

The contractor will not discharge or in any other manner discriminate against employees or applicants because they have inquired about, discussed, or disclosed their own pay or the pay of another employee or applicant. However, employees who have access to the compensation information of other employees or applicants as a part of their essential job functions cannot disclose the pay of other employees or applicants to individuals who do not otherwise have access to compensation information, unless the disclosure is (a) in response to a formal complaint or charge, (b) in furtherance of an investigation, proceeding, hearing, or action, including an investigation conducted by the employer, or (c) consistent with the contractor’s legal duty to furnish information.

description_raw_html:
Department: Enterprise Project Management Office

Position: Business Analyst -Entry-level

As a member of the Project Management team, this position will work closely with Sales and IT departments and other project teams to make sure the products or applications in development meet the needs of the end users. The position is based in the company’s Foothill Ranch, CA location.

Requirements:

  • Internal proprietary application support or development experience
  • Bachelor’s Degree
  • 2+ years related professional experience
  • Insurance industry or sales support experience preferred
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team
  • Self-motivated, ability to plan and organize, high attention to detail
  • Ability to research, analyze, and evaluate information and provide courses of action
  • Solid grasp of developing requirements for new or existing applications
  • Flexibility in how an issue/problem/situation is approached
  • Effective oral and written communication
  • Proficient in Microsoft Suite

Responsibilities include:

  • Perform analysis of business, technical and functional specifications
  • Capture and document business, portal and product requirements
  • Act as a liaison between departmental end-users and technical software developers during the analysis, design, configuration and testing phases
  • Manage the product portal configuration process by analyzing business needs, gathering sales requirements and communicating them to IT
  • Understand process of designing, configuring and maintenance of online Sales Portals and be able to communicate development timelines
  • Management, maintenance and thorough participation in acceptance testing of all types of Client-facing Portals
  • Conduct agent training and client demonstrations on the use of newly established Sales Portals
  • Validate user test cases to verify features released work as designed
  • Coordinate user acceptance testing with the appropriate business user groups as production releases are scheduled
  • Develop in-depth understanding of GBG insurance products and operational workflows
  • Sit with the business users to understand and vet all details of enhancement/change requests to ensure they will best serve the business process
  • Create business process flow diagrams considering user needs and user journeys
  • Document scope of the enhancements needed and gather supporting examples and information from business user to share with IT
  • Assist with general IT enhancement/change request tracking and prioritization
  • Identify potential process improvements and engage appropriate IT personnel to determine applicable technical solutions that will fit the needs of the users
  • Understand and proactively address the down-stream impact of implemented changes on all business groups
  • Provide basic problem solving and troubleshooting as needed
  • Documentation of configuration methods and implementation practices
  • Multi-tasking and managing various projects from start to completion
  • Ability to prioritize work as urgent issues are escalated, also able to prioritize IT tasks slated for non-urgent development
  • Other projects as assigned

Job Type: Full-time

Experience:

  • Business Analysis: 2 years (Preferred)

Education:

  • Bachelor's (Preferred)

Additional Compensation:

  • Bonuses

Benefits:

  • Health insurance
  • Dental insurance
  • Vision insurance
  • Retirement plan
  • Paid time off

description_raw_html:
Salesforce Business Analyst

The Location: Charlottesville, VA

The Team: The Information Platforms team is responsible for the management and improvements of the Business Applications that drive the S&P Global Market Intelligence division. Our team leads many internal applications from Salesforce, Order to Cash, Order Fulfillment, Reporting and Workflow tools. You will have the opportunity every single day to work with people from a wide variety of backgrounds and to develop a close team dynamic with coworkers from around the globe.

The Impact: You will work alongside a Salesforce Solutions Architect and other Salesforce team members. You will use your skills and experience to help improve our Salesforce Platform. You will be involved in strategic planning and execution that will include working in all areas of Salesforce from Service Cloud, Sales Cloud, App Partners, Lightning, Wave and more.

What’s in it for you: Would you like the opportunity to work on a team that will craft the future of the company's Salesforce Instance? You enjoy working to break down and solve complex problems by creating practical, maintainable, and scalable solutions. You're a great person that willingly collaborates, listens, and cares about your peers. This position will enable you to interact with an Agile team of in-house Salesforce professionals from around the world. We are in search of a highly motivated Project Manager / Business Analyst who is excited about utilizing their technical project management skills to lead projects from conception to completion in an Agile environment across multiple CRM teams.

Responsibilities:

  • Manage projects for Salesforce.com implementations or customizations from an Agile perspective end-to-end
  • Act as Agile Scrum Master, facilitate meetings including Daily Scrum, Retrospectives and meetings with other teams
  • Dig in to complicated technical details surrounding software product requirements
  • Work with and guide our Product Owners to fill in technical gaps in requirements
  • Eliminate impediments which are beyond the teams responsibilities to protect the team so they can stay focused on their development work
  • Support change management process for new improvements into production
  • Identify ways to better utilize Salesforce for business process, and make recommendations on improvements
  • Build a high-performing team which includes continuous improvement of the team dynamics and performance.

Qualifications:

  • 5+ years of experience as a business analyst in a technical environment
  • BA/BS in a relevant field (business or technology) or experience, with understanding of the financial services industry
  • Strong Critical Thinking and analytical skills
  • Deep knowledge of and passion for Agile/Scrum including Agile metrics and reporting techniques
  • Communication skills (presentational, active listening, ability to build consensus, and support across functions and at all levels)
  • Salesforce Certifications or willingness to achieve Admin certification within first year
  • Ability to clearly bring together and document software requirements
  • Experience working effectively in a dynamic development environment within large, global teams
  • You will be able to resolve conflict through arbitration, negotiation, reasoned discussion, or critical issue
  • Aptitude for nurturing self-organizing, high performing teams via servant leadership, individual coaching and mentoring

description_raw_html:
Multiple Positions

Job Description

As a Java software developer focused on the Financial Services sector for APPS Consultants Inc you will participate in all aspects of the engineering life cycle. You will be writing fully testable core-platform code, deploying software to our cloud infrastructure, and troubleshooting problems in production. Our primary language is Java, but we welcome experience with other languages such as Python, Groovy and Javascript.

Work within an agile development environment with other developers and product owners to scope, develop and deliver world-class software solutions Influence / lead projects and technical direction of the product
Work directly with Product Management and Sales to design and develop new product features

Qualifications

Required Skills and Experience:

6+ years software development experience, including Java and Unix
Experience developing and deploying software in distributed environments
Experience in the tools required in a development life cycle: build (Maven, Gradle), unit testing (JUnit, TestNG), version control (Git), task and defect management (Jira), Agile development approaches.

Desired Skills and Experience:

Proficiency with GIT as a version control system
Experience with Python, Ruby & JavaScript
Experience with NoSQL solutions such as Cassandra, MongoDB, Redis
Capital Markets/Asset Management Solutions Development
Experience developing scalable systems
Experience working in a SCRUM team.

We offer a friendly team oriented workplace and our benefits are among the best in the business including matching 401K program, medical, dental, vision, disability and life insurance, wellness programs, tuition reimbursement, an extremely generous vacation package and more.

APPS Consultants Inc is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer with a commitment to workplace diversity. Employment is contingent upon successful completion of background investigation and pre-employment drug screen. APPS participates in eVerify.


Job Location: Hollywood, FL

description_raw_html:
You'll be responsible for the following:

  • Understand, scope, develop and sustain mobility products
  • Work with Offshore development teams and co-ordinate
  • Job may require travel up to 15% of the time

Who You'll Work With


You will be part of the Mobile Core Business Unit (MCBU), which is enabling Mobile Network Operators (MNOs) personalize the mobile experience to make the most out of the challenges, and opportunities it presents. MCBU products have #1 market share in US, deployed at 300 Mobile operators, carrying 1 Billion subscribers, 2 Billion sessions, and 3 TB worth of internet traffic.


The Mobile Core Business Unit was created to focus on mobile Internet transformation where mobile data traffic growing very rapidly and ever more complex for operators to monetize. The business unit enables mobile operators to make the most out of the innovation, challenges and opportunities it presents in 5G/4G space. MCBU also focuses on 5G EPC nodes which supports CUPS (Control and User Plane Separation) and containerization/virtualization.


MCBU is a trusted partner to operators migrating to the next generation virtual networks. MCBU continues to be the market leader in mobility, delivering virtual and cloud solutions that address service provider challenges of network reach, network intelligence, and service creation velocity while enhancing overall profitability. MCBU is responsible for complete development of 4G/5G nodes ( Both NSA and SA ).


You will work within and across teams of focused premier mobility engineers. Socialize with key focused groups such as product management, sales, customer support and advanced services.


Who You Are


You will work with bedrock of engineering talent. You encourage, challenge and work with the team to innovate solutions, products and associated features.


You will have Good understanding of Unix/Linux Kernel and a deep understanding of Operating systems, data structures and awareness about efficient algorithms. You will also have the below:

  • 4G/5G 3GPP architecture familiarity
  • Diameter or Radius technologies experience
  • MongoDB or other NoSQL Databases, REST API experience
  • OpenStack/VMWare expertise
  • Kubernetes and/or other virtualization expertise
  • Excellent communication/presentation/negotiation skills

description_raw_html:
Description:
OWN YOUR POTENTIAL BY EMBARKING ON AN EXCITING CAREER-CHANGING JOURNEY!

FutureSoftIT has a foundation in the core belief that a career change can stimulate and energize an individual; both professionally and in their personal lives. We are shifting the staffing industry norm of being "job-focused", to a much healthier "people-focused" initiative.

Should you find yourself wondering if CHANGE is what you need, then please consider this new and challenging position listed below. Our Technical Resource Specialist will connect with you after you apply. They'll want to listen first to truly understand what you're looking for in a new opportunity. Hopefully this will check most, if not all, of the boxes in your criteria for taking the first step in the hiring process.

Here's what we know for this Direct-Hire position of a Business Analyst/Project Manager...

MAIN PURPOSE:
Softura is looking for a Business Analyst/Project Manager for our Farmington Hills office OR in our our Chicago, IL office.

This person will be responsible for delivering software projects that require a deep understanding of the software engineering process. It is important that this person have excellent communication and documentation skills to understand the end-user perspective and to write clear and concise business requirements.

The BA/PM must be experienced managing numerous projects simultaneously, participate in business analysis and possess a strong background in technology. This is a hybrid role and responsibilities can shift throughout projects, i.e., there may be times where the position will require more PM work than BA work or vice versa. As part of a growing company and team, the role requires strong leadership and forward thinking in order to deliver valuable solutions to our clients. We recognize those who are results-oriented, have a strong sense of responsibility, take ownership of their projects and successfully manage multiple tasks in a rapidly changing environment.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:
Define Solutions & Document Requirements

  • Gather business requirements via proactive communication and collaboration with partners, clients, industry and internal experts.
  • Document business requirements and specifications, including functional and non-functional requirements, flow charts, process descriptions, user cases, user stories, acceptance criteria and data specifications
  • Assist the testing team in developing test cases, reviewing them and signing off on the final outcome
  • Work with technical architects who have responsibility to design solutions that meet the requirements. Collaborate with business and technical resources internally and externally to achieve the solution
  • Serve as the conduit between the client stakeholders and the software development team, including the offshore development team.
Deliver Solutions

  • Ensure the on-time release of deliverables by coordinating schedules with development teams, Softura partners and clients. Development teams may include offshore project managers, development managers, technical lead, developers and QA
  • Coordinate deliverables into requirements road-maps and technical solution road-maps
  • Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and manage the feedback from the client
  • Report on key metrics of a project to internal stakeholders and client key stakeholders
  • Maintain and prioritize the product backlog as per business value and needs
  • Manage project schedule and Work Breakdown Structure, create and update Requirements Traceability Matrix, track and report hours spent against estimates, review and approve time sheets, track project completion, projects risks, project funds and provide a weekly project update to internal and external stakeholders
  • Manage enhancement and change requests, estimate added efforts and execute change orders in a timely manner
  • Maintain and update Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) and provide a update at the end of each sprint to internal and external stakeholders
  • Proactively managing and communicating risks and tracking issues closure to ensure smooth delivery of software solutions
Required Skills and Knowledge

  • Ability to understand technology and business process and how the two are dependent upon one another for solution delivery
  • Effectively communicates with both technical and non-technical staff, stakeholders, development team
  • Prepare and communicate status reports to team and management
  • Elicit business requirements from key stakeholders by using interviews, document analysis requirements workshops, task and workflow analysis
  • Excellent computer proficiency (MS Office Word, Excel, Visio, PowerPoint, SharePoint)
  • Work on multiple projects from small to large scale in a cross-functional environment
  • Able to work independently, be a collaborative team player, excellent time management and prioritization skills, able to manage a heavy workload at times, ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines, while maintaining a positive attitude, and providing exemplary customer service
FutureSoftIT is stronger with YOU contributing to our continued success!

DON'T DELAY - APPLY TODAY!.

Requirements:
MAIN REQUIREMENTS:
Bachelor’s Degree in Business or Computer Science
5-7 years of experience as a Business Analyst/Project Manager developing business requirements, process flows, and program charters and/or statements of work
Experience running client meetings for gathering requirements, managing projects, collaborating on solutions and resolving issues
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, including ability to effectively communicate with internal teams and external customers, technical and non-technical staff, stakeholders, and development teams
Excellent teamwork skills
A strong background in technology, analysis and critical evaluation of information gathered from multiple sources

PREFERRED REQUIREMENTS:
Master's degree in Business or Computer Science
Experience with Agile software development or Scrum Master Certification
Hands-on programming experience developing web or mobile applications in C#, Java, ASP.net
Experience in object oriented analysis and design using UML methodology

description_raw_html:
CreditUnion Leasing of America (CULA) is one of the fastest growing companies in SanDiego and we are the leader in one of the top markets in America. CULA providesindirect auto leasing services to credit unions. We've been leading the waysince 1988 to successfully deploy auto leasing programs within credit unionsacross the country.

We areseeking a Project Manager/Business Analyst to be responsiblefor coordinating internal & external projects related to indirect vehicleleasing with CULA and their credit union and dealer partners. In this role,your mission is to use an understanding of our business processes and software,as well as an ability to work well across different teams in the company, toeffectively drive business-critical projects forward.

PositionDescription:

OurProject Manager/Business Analyst is responsible for driving large scaleinitiatives from initial opportunity clarification and research, to projecttimeline and milestone creation, through launch communication and businessadoption. This role calls for a strong project manager capable of autonomouslydriving multiple projects in parallel. This position is the dream opportunityfor an ambitious professional looking to have a significant impact in afast-growing company.

EssentialResponsibilities and Duties include:

  • Define, document and own the project requirements, specifications and implementation plans. Perform requirements analysis.
  • Conduct meetings and presentations to drive projects forward and share ideas and findings.
  • Communicate decisions and action items to meeting attendees
  • Develop and implement timelines and test plans to ensure successful delivery of projects.
  • Become an expert in Seamless, CULA’s proprietary lease tracking software.
  • Understand and document external and internal Seamless enhancement requests and remain familiar with the product backlog list as new requests arrive and business needs change.
  • Test new releases of Seamless software.
  • Work with team members throughout the company to learn business processes.
  • Learn and evaluate business processes, anticipating requirements, uncovering areas for improvement, and proposing solutions.
  • Constantly strive to improve the way we work together.
  • Become proficient in the US credit union and automotive leasing industries including the market players and industry trends.

Qualifications:

  • 5 years relevant experience
  • 3+ years of project management experience
  • Crisp and clear communication style across all mediums and with both business and technology stakeholder groups.
  • Extensive experience gathering requirements to include analyzing, prioritizing and documenting.
  • Proven ability to deliver on commitments.
  • Ability to influence and to work autonomously.
  • Ability to handle multiple competing priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • A fantastic ability to listen and to identify what the real need is.
  • An analytical approach for effectively evaluating and executing trade-off decisions but able to rely on intuition when the data set is incomplete.
  • Experience presenting to executive leadership and handling sensitive customer situations.
  • High proficiency in Microsoft Office products, with emphasis on Excel and project management applications.
  • Experience in the auto finance, credit union and vehicle lease industries are a plus.
  • Experience in the financial technology markets is desired.
  • SQL a plus

Education:

  • Bachelor's degree with a quantitative emphasis is required.
  • PMP Certification a plus

Compensation: Competitive and based on experience with excellent benefits and bonus structure.

Job Type: Full-time

Experience:

  • relevant: 5 years (Preferred)
  • Project Management: 3 years (Preferred)

Additional Compensation:

  • Bonuses

Work Location:

  • One location

Benefits:

  • Health insurance
  • Dental insurance
  • Vision insurance
  • Retirement plan
  • Paid time off

PMP Certification a plus Compensation: Competitive and based on experience with excellent benefits and bonus structure. Job Type: Full-time Experience: relevant: 5 years (Preferred) Project Management: 3 years (Preferred) Additional Compensation: Bonuses Work Location: One location Benefits: Health insurance Dental insurance Vision insurance Retirement plan Paid time off

description_raw_html:
Business Analyst Manager

WheresMyConcrete, A Division of U.S. Concrete

Dallas Fort Worth

WheresMyConcrete WMC provides innovative, cloud-based software solutions to the concrete industry that focus on efficiency, customer experience, and mobility. Products include dispatching, electronic billing, mobile tickets, sales tools, enhanced analytics, and live customer interaction. WMC utilizes modern web and mobile technologies in an agile, iterative environment. WMC is the software division of U.S. Concrete NASDAQ: USCR and services customers across the United States and Australia.


Position Summary

The Business Analyst Manager manages a team of resources that implement, train, support and define feature enhancements for the WMC product line. Success in this role requires hands-on involvement in all aspects of the application lifecycle management and superior communication and management skills in dealing with team members and customers.

This position will report directly to the Director of Business Analysis.


Essential Job Functions

  • Leads a team of business analysts in implementing and supporting the WMC product line.
  • Work closely with our Customers to support, develop, and implement scalable, robust solutions that increase efficiencies and improve the user experience
  • Accountable for exploring, capturing, understanding, enhancing and documenting business requirements. Assignments can cover any business function and are unlimited in scope and complexity.
  • Formulates and defines systems scope and objectives based on both business needs and a thorough understanding of IT systems and industry requirements.
  • Develops training materials and conducts training sessions for end users as required.
  • Oversees multiple high-visibility projects and initiatives, coordinating schedules and stakeholder communications with customers.
  • Leads and manages project teams and works closely with customers.
  • Works with and assist in managing vendors and contract resources.
  • Supports day to day systems management, including new installs, new acquisitions, upgrading and troubleshooting of WMC.
  • Monitors industry and technical trends, assessing impacts on current and future applications.
  • Monitors project status and completion daily to ensure projects are on track and moving towards completion.
  • Identifies and proactively mitigates project issues and risks.
  • Travels occasionally as required.
  • Other duties as required


Qualifications

  • Strong business analysis, software development/engineering background.
  • Proven track record for successfully delivering projects on time and under budget.
  • Able to plan, staff and direct a group of professionals.
  • Possesses a strong knowledge of IT technologies and their capabilities.
  • Strong communication skills at all levels of the organization.
  • Relentless commitment to authentic relationships and continuous improvement of those relationships.
  • Proactive work ethic and intellectual curiosity.
  • Project management/PMP certification is a plus.
  • Strong customer service mentality.


Education and Experience

  • 10+ years technical experience in a variety of system environments.
  • Staff management experience.
  • Demonstrated prior leadership in planning, directing and administering of work efforts.
  • Effective verbal and written communications skills.
  • Knowledge and expertise in the construction materials industry a plus.
  • Experience with Command Alkon products a plus.
  • Bachelor's degree, MBA a plus.
